title: BigBasket Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: BigBasket Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at BigBasket Consulting Pvt Ltd. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Full Stack Developer to strengthen our Aurangabad-based team.

About BigBasket Consulting Pvt Ltd:
BigBasket Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BigBasket Consulting Pvt Ltd!
